elements.original_description: A glowing red arrow pointing upward on a pure white background, with small sparkles radiating from its tip. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a glowing red arrow pointing upward on a pure white background, with small sparkling light effects radiating from its tip. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, sharp edges, no shading or gradients. Cinematic lighting for a sense of dynamic movement. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
